config.script:
'harui #include "50101"
'setstaticstyle #include "50100"
'NavoIndex #include "50510"
dim g_pPicIdModule : set g_pPicIdModule = nothing dim pTreeHost
function fopen(): fopen = false
if not std_fopen() then exit function end if
'---- klient idobj (required) --------- dim idKlient if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) then idKlient = trans_.var(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) else if trans_.isvar(GVAR_OBJECT) then idKlient = trans_.var(GVAR_OBJECT) else exit function end if end if
'wczytywanie grup - tworzenie indeksow, read_group idKlient
set g_pPicIdModule = doc_.getmodule(60301) '-- configure -------- set pTreeHost = doc_.getmodule(43006) dim pPB : set pPB = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder()
dim pTreeDef : set pTreeDef = pTreeHost.prepare_explorer(pPB)
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false
pPB.set_body_builder getref("grupyproduktow_body_builder")
'funkcje wywolywane w odpowienich momentach 'transfery pTreeHost.set_transfer_handler_enter getref("OnTranslateMessage") 'fback pTreeHost.set_close_handler getref("OnCloseChoice") 'fsave pTreeHost.set_save_handler getref("OnSaveChoice")
pTreeHost.show pTreeDef,"Grupa produktów - dane klienta",TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,0
end function
function fclose() set g_pPicIdModule = nothing end function
function grupyproduktow_body_builder(byref pBodyCell,byref pObject) pBodyCell.keepline = true
dim pPicture : set pPicture = pBodyCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) with pPicture .width=Clng( SIZE_FOR_LIST ) .height=CLng( SIZE_FOR_LIST ) .image = g_pPicIdModule.get_obj_pic_id(pObject.type,pObject.idobj, PICUSE_LISTELEM) end with dim pCheckbox set pCheckbox = pBodyCell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX, -1) pCheckbox.border = 0
dim pText:set pText = pCheckbox.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pText.text = pObject.text
dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(1) = clng(pObject.type) hli.prop(2) = clng(pObject.idobj) set pText.userprop = hli
'pTreeHost.addxml pCheckbox.ident, "<transfer mode='custom'></transfer>" set pCheckbox.transfer = pTreeHost.createtransfer("custom")
pCheckbox.customredirect CLng(CTRLID_CHECKBOX_REDIRECT)
dim pTreeNode
set pTreeNode=pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX.getindex(pObject.idobj) pTreeNode.varValue.idCtrl=pCheckbox.ident pTreeNode.varValue.idText=pText.ident
SetCheckBoxStyle pText.ident, pTreeNode, pTreeHost
if (pTreeNode.varValue.value) then pCheckbox.value="1" end if
'msgbox cstr(pObject.type)
grupyproduktow_body_builder = true end function
function SetCheckBoxStyle(byval nIdText, byref pTreeLevel, byref pPage) dim pCtrl set pCtrl=pPage.trygetctrl(nIdText)
if (not pCtrl is nothing) then if ((pTreeLevel.varValue.nElems=pTreeLevel.varValue.nSelectedElems) and (pTreeLevel.varValue.nElems>0)) then SetStaticStyle pCtrl, true, false else SetStaticStyle pCtrl, false, false end if end if end function
'************************************************************* 'wczytywanie
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Klasa reprezentuje jeden element w drzewie '---------------------------------------------------------------------- class CTreeValue public idObj 'identyfikator obiektu public typeId 'typ obiektu public value 'czy zaznaczony checkbox czy tez nie (true/false) public start_value 'wartosc początkowa public idKlient 'id klienta
public nElems public nSelectedElems
public idCtrl public idText
private sub class_initialize() nElems=0 nSelectedElems=0 idCtrl=0 idText=0 value=false start_value=false end sub
public function elems(byval nValChange) nElems=nElems+nValChange value=(nSelectedElems>0) end function
public function selected_elems(byval nValChange) nSelectedElems=nSelectedElems+nValChange value=(nSelectedElems>0) end function
end class
'indeksy przyspieszajace wyszukiwanie grup i elementow grup dim pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX
'wskaznik na drzewo pabierajace hierarchie pomiedzy grupami 'i elementami danej grupy dim pTree
function read_group ( byval nKlient )
'......................................... ' Inicjujemy indexy '.........................................
set pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX=new CNavoIndex
'......................................... ' Wypelniamy drzewo informacjami o stanie ' uprawnien '.........................................
dim pPerf set pPerf = doc_.performing("Czytanie grup produktów . . . .")
set pTree=new CNavoTree
dim pRoot set pRoot=pTree.getRoot()
dim pTreeValue set pTreeValue=new CTreeValue
pTreeValue.idObj = CLng(0) pTreeValue.typeId = CLng(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW) pTreeValue.idKlient = CLng(nKlient)
set pRoot.pfnOnNewChild=getref("OnNewChild") set pRoot.varValue=pTreeValue
'zapytanie dla korzenia
OnNewChild pRoot
'wypełniamy drzewo informacjami o liczbie zaznaczonych dzieci SetChildrenInfo pRoot
set pPerf = nothing
end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Wypelniamy rekrursywanie drzewo na podstawie już nadanych uprawnien '---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnNewChild(byref pChild) dim strQuery, pRecordset, pTreeValue
if ( pChild.varValue.typeId=CLng(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW) ) then
'dodaj tree node do indexu grup pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX.Add pChild.varValue.idObj, pChild
'poinformuj oja o nowym elemencie if (not pChild.pParent is nothing) then pChild.pParent.varValue.elems 1 end if
pChild.varValue.value=false
'dodaj elementy grupy i zaznacz czy dany element (grupa) posiadal 'juz dany klient - czy ma nadaną taką grupę strQuery="select gp.IdObj as IdGrupyProd,ISNULL(kg.IdObj,0) as nExistsGroup from n5grupaproduktow gp " + _ "left outer join n5klient_grupaprod kg on kg.klgpr_pGrupaProd = gp.IdObj and kg.klgpr_pKlient=" + CStr(pChild.varValue.idKlient) + " " + _ "where gp.pGrupaNadrzedna=" + CStr(pChild.varValue.idObj) set pRecordset=trans_.createadors(strQuery)
dim nSelected: nSelected=0
if (not pRecordset.eof) then
while not pRecordset.eof set pTreeValue=new CTreeValue
pTreeValue.idObj=CLng(pRecordset.fields(0).value) pTreeValue.idKlient=CLng(pChild.varValue.idKlient) pTreeValue.typeId=CLng(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW)
dim pChildElem set pChildElem=pChild.AddChild( pTreeValue )
pChildElem.varValue.value=(CLng(pRecordset.fields(1).value)>0) pChildElem.varValue.start_value=pChildElem.varValue.value
'poinformuj ojca o liczbie elementow if (not pChildElem.pParent is nothing) then 'parent liczy sobie liczbe dzieci - dodaj pChildElem.pParent.varValue.elems 1 end if
pRecordset.movenext wend end if end if end function
function SetChildrenInfo(byref pTreeLevel) if (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()=0) then exit function end if
'ustawiamy wartosci we wszystkich dzieciach dim i, nSelected: nSelected=0 for i = 0 to (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()-1) SetChildrenInfo pTreeLevel.getChild(i)
if (pTreeLevel.getChild(i).varValue.value) then nSelected=nSelected+1 end if next
pTreeLevel.varValue.nSelectedElems=nSelected pTreeLevel.varValue.value=(pTreeLevel.varValue.nSelectedElems>0) end function
function SetConstChildrenInfo(byref pTreeLevel, byval bNewValue, byref pPage) if (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()=0) then exit function end if
'ustawiamy wartosci we wszystkich dzieciach dim i for i = 0 to (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()-1) SetConstChildrenInfo pTreeLevel.getChild(i), bNewValue, pPage next
if (bNewValue) then pTreeLevel.varValue.nSelectedElems=pTreeLevel.varValue.nElems pTreeLevel.varValue.value=true else pTreeLevel.varValue.nSelectedElems=0 pTreeLevel.varValue.value=false end if
SetCheckBoxStyle pTreeLevel.varValue.idText, pTreeLevel, pPage end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Zdarzenie na ondataentered dla wszystkich checkbox'ow '---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnTranslateMessage(byref pCtrl, byval varNewValue,byref pPage ): OnTranslateMessage=false dim pRow:set pRow = pCtrl.parent.parent dim nIndent:nIndent = pRow.userprop.prop(1) dim nTypeID:nTypeId = pCtrl.element(1).userprop.prop(1) dim idObj:idObj = pCtrl.element(1).userprop.prop(2)
'Szukamy elementu, ktorego zmienilismy selekcje 'i zaznaczamy jego samego w drzewie i jezeli 'byl to element typu grupa zaznaczamy rowniez 'wszystkie elementy w tej grupie
dim bNewValue bNewValue=(varNewValue="1")
dim pTreeElem set pTreeElem=pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX.getIndex(idObj)
dim bOldValue, bChangedValue bOldValue=pTreeElem.varValue.value bChangedValue=(bOldValue<>bNewValue)
'ustaw nowa wartosc dla aktualnego elementu i dla dzieci 'tego elementu SetValueInTree pTreeElem, bNewValue, pPage
if (bChangedValue) then if (not bNewValue) then SetParentInfo pTreeElem.pParent, -1, pPage else SetParentInfo pTreeElem.pParent, 1, pPage end if end if
SetConstChildrenInfo pTreeElem, bNewValue, pPage
'zaznaczamy fizycznie to co widac na ekranie
'pobieramy nastepny wiersz dim pRowNext:set pRowNext = pRow.nextelement dim nIndentNext
while true 'jezeli nie ma go to spadamy if pRowNext is nothing then OnTranslateMessage=true exit function end if 'sprawdzamy wcięcie nIndentNext = pRowNext.userprop.prop(1) 'i dzalamy dalej tylko jesli jest większe if (nIndent < nIndentNext) then ExploreCheckbox pRowNext, varNewValue set pRowNext = pRowNext.nextelement else ' w prezciwnym razie spadamy OnTranslateMessage=true exit function end if wend
OnTranslateMessage=true end function
function ExploreCheckbox(byref pRootElem, byval strNewValue)
dim pElement for each pElement in pRootElem select case CLng(pElement.type) case CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX pElement.value=strNewValue
case CTRL_TYPE_TABLECELL ExploreCheckbox pElement, strNewValue
case CTRL_TYPE_TABLEROW ExploreCheckbox pElement, strNewValue
case CTRL_TYPE_TABLE ExploreCheckbox pElement.body, strNewValue
end select next end function
function SetCellStyle(byref pCell) pCell.border=1 pCell.bordercolor=rgb(R_FOR_TABLE_HDR,G_FOR_TABLE_HDR,B_FOR_TABLE_HDR) end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Ustaw na wszystkich poziomach nową wartość '---------------------------------------------------------------------- function SetValueInTree(byref pTreeLevel, byval bNewValue, byref pPage) dim bChangedValue, bOldValue
bOldValue=pTreeLevel.varValue.value pTreeLevel.varValue.value=bNewValue bChangedValue=(bOldValue<>bNewValue)
'zaznacz ojca jezeli istnieje taka koniecznosc if (bChangedValue) then
dim pParentValue set pParentValue=pTreeLevel.pParent.varValue
dim bOldValueChBox bOldValueChBox=pParentValue.value
bChangedValue=(bOldValueChBox<>pParentValue.value)
if (bChangedValue) then
dim pCtrl set pCtrl=pPage.trygetctrl(pParentValue.idCtrl)
if (not pCtrl is nothing) then if (pParentValue.value) then pCtrl.value="1" else pCtrl.value="0" end if end if
end if end if
'dany poziom znajduje się na końcu drzewa (nie ma dzieci) 'to konczymy ustawianie if (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()=0) then exit function end if
'ustawiamy wartosci we wszystkich dzieciach dim i for i = 0 to (pTreeLevel.ChildrenCount()-1) SetValueInTree pTreeLevel.getChild(i), bNewValue, pPage next
end function
function SetParentInfo(byref pTreeLevel, byval nRemoveAdd, byref pPage)
if (pTreeLevel is nothing) then exit function end if
dim bOldValue bOldValue=pTreeLevel.varValue.value
pTreeLevel.varValue.selected_elems nRemoveAdd SetCheckBoxStyle pTreeLevel.varValue.idText, pTreeLevel, pPage
if (bOldValue<>pTreeLevel.varValue.value) then
dim pCtrl set pCtrl=pPage.trygetctrl(pTreeLevel.varValue.idCtrl)
if (not pCtrl is nothing) then if (bOldValue) then pCtrl.value="0" else pCtrl.value="1" end if end if
if (bOldValue) then SetParentInfo pTreeLevel.pParent, -1, pPage else SetParentInfo pTreeLevel.pParent, 1, pPage end if end if end function
'------------------------------------ 'zapisanie grup produktów na kliencie '------------------------------------ function SaveGroups(): SaveGroups=false
dim pDic set pDic = pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX.getDictionary()
dim pItems pItems = pDic.Items
dim pTrans set pTrans = trans_.createsubtran()
dim pPerf set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa zapis grup produktów...")
dim pKlient: set pKlient = nothing
dim i for i = 1 to (pDic.Count-1) dim pItem set pItem=pItems(i)
if (pItem.varValue.value<>pItem.varValue.start_value) then dim nKlientGrupProdId
if (pItem.varValue.value) then
dim idActiveGroup idActiveGroup = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW, "IdObj=" + CStr( pItem.varValue.idObj ))
if (idActiveGroup=pItem.varValue.idObj) then
dim pActiveGroup set pActiveGroup=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW, pItem.varValue.idObj)
if (pKlient is nothing) then set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT, pItem.varValue.idKlient) end if
nKlientGrupProdId = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_GRUPAPROD, "klgpr_pKlient=" + CStr(pItem.varValue.idKlient) + " and klgpr_pGrupaProd=" + CStr(pItem.varValue.idObj)) if (nKlientGrupProdId = 0) then if ((not pActiveGroup is nothing) and (not pKlient is nothing)) then dim pObjToAdd set pObjToAdd=trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_GRUPAPROD)
set pObjToAdd.klgpr_pGrupaProd = pActiveGroup set pObjToAdd.klgpr_pKlient = pKlient end if end if
end if
else 'usuwamy rekord nKlientGrupProdId = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_GRUPAPROD, "klgpr_pKlient=" + CStr(pItem.varValue.idKlient) + " and klgpr_pGrupaProd=" + CStr(pItem.varValue.idObj))
if (nKlientGrupProdId > 0) then dim pObjToDel set pObjToDel=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_GRUPAPROD, nKlientGrupProdId)
if (not pObjToDel is nothing) then pObjToDel.markdel=true end if
end if end if pItem.varValue.start_value=pItem.varValue.value end if next
SaveGroups=trans_.saveobjects()
set pPerf = nothing set pTrans= nothing
end function
'----------------------------------- 'wywolywanie na zamykanie formularza '----------------------------------- function OnCloseChoice()
dim pDic set pDic = pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX.getDictionary()
dim pItems pItems = pDic.Items
dim i, pItem, bHasChanges: bHasChanges=false for i = 1 to (pDic.Count-1) set pItem=pItems(i) if (pItem.varValue.value<>pItem.varValue.start_value) then bHasChanges=true exit for end if next
if (bHasChanges) then
dim nResult: nResult=doc_.getmodule(60111).message_box(trans_.var(8003), "Dane zmienione. Zachować?", vbQuestion, vbYesNoCancel) if (nResult=vbCancel) then OnCloseChoice=false exit function elseif (nResult=vbNo) then
set pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX = nothing set pTree = nothing
OnCloseChoice=true exit function end if
OnCloseChoice=SaveGroups()
if OnCloseChoice then set pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX = nothing set pTree = nothing end if
exit function
end if 'bHasChanges
set pGrupaNadrzednaINDEX = nothing set pTree = nothing
OnCloseChoice=true end function
'------------------------------------ 'zapis uprawnień - wywlywane na fsave '------------------------------------ function OnSaveChoice() OnSaveChoice=SaveGroups() end function
